title: Mademoiselle de La Seiglière
actors: Huguette Duflos, Catherine Fonteney, Félix Huguenet
plot: The Marquis de la Seiglière returns to France once the Revolution is over. His possessions, which had been sold as material properties, had been purchased by Stamply, a farmer. The latter restores them to the Marquis, who decides ...
